team.label: Team
team.title: The people of NUAR
team.description: Specialists you entrust your body to — with experience, intuition, and a personal approach.

olha.bio: Olha is a Top Master with years of experience in therapeutic and relaxing massage. Guests praise her intuitive touch and ability to find exactly where the body holds tension.

max.bio: Max specializes in sports and restorative massage. He works precisely on overloaded muscles, helping athletes and active professionals recover faster and move with ease.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Guest questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions before your first visit.

items.question: How do I book a visit?
items.answer: Fastest via Booksy — choose a service, therapist, and convenient time. You can also call +48 452 402 006.

items.question: Where is NUAR studio located?
items.answer: In central Warsaw at ul. Świętojerska 5/7 (00-236). A few minutes' walk from Ratusz Arsenał metro.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept cash, card, BLIK, and bank transfer. Details are confirmed when booking on Booksy.

items.question: Can I cancel or reschedule?
items.answer: Yes — change your appointment directly in the Booksy app. Please notify us as early as possible.

items.question: Which massage should I choose for my first visit?
items.answer: If unsure, we recommend a relaxing or signature massage — your therapist will adapt the technique after a brief consultation.

items.question: Are massages available for children?
items.answer: Yes, we offer massage for children aged 5–18. Gentle, safe, and supportive for active young athletes.

items.question: Is there a discount for first visits?
items.answer: We regularly offer promotions on selected massages — current discounts are shown in the pricing section.

booking.label: Booking
booking.title: Pause. Breathe. Book a moment just for yourself.
booking.subtitle: Up to 18% off selected rituals. Available times online on Booksy.
